channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: S Corp vs. LLC: Key Structural Differences Explained
item.description: A comparison of S corporations and LLCs covering how each business structure affects taxation, liability exposure, and day-to-day management responsibilities.

item.title: Seven Active Macy's Coupon Codes Worth Using This Season
item.description: A roundup of current Macy's discount codes offering savings on a range of clothing and branded merchandise available through the retailer this season.

item.title: How to Use a Self-Employment Tax Calculator Effectively
item.description: A guide to using self-employment tax calculators, covering the steps involved and key information needed to estimate tax obligations accurately during filing.

item.title: NYT Connections Hints and Answers for Saturday, April 25 (#1049)
item.description: Clues and solutions for the April 25 edition of NYT Connections are available for players looking to maintain their winning streak.

item.title: Garmin Cirqa: What We Know So Far About the Upcoming Whoop Competitor
item.description: Expected within weeks, the Garmin Cirqa signals a more lifestyle-oriented direction for the fitness-focused wearable brand.
